I am in my Facebook Business Manager right now. If you don't have a Business Manager yet, please go to business.facebook.com and set one up. Pause this video until you've done that. Now that you're back, what we're gonna do is we're gonna go ahead and create a pixel so that we can connect our ClickFunnels and Facebook accounts. So in the upper left-hand corner of the Business Manager, I'm gonna click and then go to our Events Manager. If you have multiple ad accounts, then it is very important that you make sure that you are selecting the correct one in the upper left-hand corner. I'm gonna go to my personal ad account so that I can make a pixel with you guys because you can only have one pixel per ad account. So in order to make a pixel, you're gonna go ahead and just click on Get Started. Then you can name the pixel whatever you want. And then the website URL, we're gonna leave blank. So I'm gonna go ahead and click that Create button. And then I'm gonna manually install the pixel code into my ClickFunnel. So a pixel, it's easiest to think of it as something like a tracker. So we're just placing a tracker inside of our ClickFunnel. So I'm gonna scroll down to the number two button and copy this code to our clipboard. After that, we're gonna go to our ClickFunnels account and to the funnel of our choice, so the one we need to install it in. We'll go to Settings in the upper right-hand corner. And then we're just gonna place the code inside of the head tracking code. From here, you'll scroll all the way down and save and update settings. There we go. And now that we have our Facebook pixel placed, I will see you in the next video.
